---
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time, categories]
  feed: true
  categories: false
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

::: {.section-head}
<p class="section-crumb">blog/</p>

# Articles & Deep Dives

<p class="section-subtitle">From-scratch implementations of the building blocks of modern AI products — embeddings, retrieval, evals, agents, fine-tuning. Each post pairs explanation with running code and measured experiments.</p>
:::
